calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Shao Hua Chen and Sonny Wu were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minor Yu Kang Wu, who was also present at today's hearing.
Allen Li was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Petitioner were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Anna Wu.

Additionally, the Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jacky Wu.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
